headings.usage: All page titles, card headers, and modal titles. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: All standard text, inputs, table data, and labels.

primary.description: Royal Blue - Trustworthy and energetic. Use for primary buttons, active states, and key highlights.

secondary.description: Slate 100 - Use for secondary buttons, backgrounds of sidebar/header.

structure.dashboard: Sidebar (Left) + Topbar (Header) + Main Content Area (Gray Background)
structure.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.style: Flat colors, no gradients. Primary buttons must have 'font-medium'.
buttons.hover: Must have distinct hover state (darken by 10%).

cards.style: Clean white cards with a subtle 1px border (slate-200).
cards.twist: Add a 'top accent' border for key metric cards (border-t-4 border-primary).

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-md h-10

tables.style: Clean rows, no vertical borders. Header text uppercase, small, and muted (text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500).

sidebar.style: Fixed left, white background, border-r border-slate-200.
sidebar.item_style: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-primary transition-colors

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Color matches text-secondary unless active.

images.logo_placeholder: Use text 'Taron Technology' in Manrope ExtraBold, Primary Color.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds or buttons.
DO NOT center text in cards or dashboards; use left alignment for readability.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use 'recharts' for data visualization with the custom palette defined above.
Maintain a 'Clean Corporate' aesthetic: lots of whitespace, subtle borders, no heavy shadows.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the dashboard using a Sidebar Layout. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps all protected routes. Use the defined color palette in 'tailwind.config.js'. Ensure the Login page uses the provided background image with a glassmorphism card for the form.
